channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Pulisic scores twice, US beats Jamaica 4-2 for 5-2 aggregate win in CONCACAF Nations League QF
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Christian Pulisic scored twice in the first half, Tim Weah got a goal in his return to the U.S. national team from a red card and the Americans beat Jamaica 4-2 on Monday night for a 5-2 aggregate win in their CONCACAF Nations League quarterfinal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants bench QB Daniel Jones and will start Tommy DeVito against the Bucs
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Daniel Jones' tenure as the New York Giants' starting quarterback is over.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: BYU still controls own destiny for Big 12 Championship
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is in a position it hasn't been in all season long -- trying to bounce back from a loss. The Cougars suffered their first defeat of the season Saturday night, a disappointing 17-13 loss to Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NHL ref leaves game on stretcher after colliding with Avalanche player
item.description: NHL referee Mitch Dunning was removed from a game between the Colorado Avalanche and Philadelphia Flyers after he collided with a player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bronny James has a left heel bruise and is listed as doubtful for the Lakers' next game
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James has a bruised left heel, and he is listed as doubtful for the Los Angeles Lakers' next game against the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans; no injuries reported
item.description: Officials say a piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a game against Houston on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Pirates ace Paul Skenes and Yankees pitcher Luis Gil win Rookie of the Year awards
item.description: Hard-throwing Pittsburgh Pirates ace Paul Skenes capped a remarkable season by winning the National League Rookie of the Year Award while Luis Gil of the New York Yankees edged Baltimore’s Colton Cowser to take the AL honor.
item.dc:creator: Bernie Wilson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 4-time MLB All-Star Kris Bryant’s Lamborghini recovered after investigation cracked down on car theft ring
item.description: Colorado Rockies star third baseman Kris Bryant had his Lamborghini Huracan stolen as part of a car theft ring while reportedly trying to ship it to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight draws record betting for a combat sports event
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Jake Paul's unanimous victory over former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson might have been disappointing from a competitive standpoint, but it drew record betting.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25: TCU earns best ranking in 16 years in women's basketball poll as top 12 remain unchanged
item.description: No. 19 TCU entered The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll with its best ranking in 16 years Monday while the first 12 teams, led by No. 1 South Carolina, were unchanged. The Horned Frogs joined the rankings after topping then-No. 13 N.C. State on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Morgan, San Juan, Beaver win state football titles
item.description: CEDAR CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of unbeatens, Morgan High proved to be the last team standing in the 3A high school football playoffs. The Trojans beat Richfield in a defensive battle Saturday night at Southern Utah University, 13-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls look to break Rockets' 4-game win streak Sunday
item.description: Houston Rockets (9-4, third in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (5-8, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 7 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Houston is looking to prolong its four-game win streak with a victory against Chicago. The Bulls are 1-4 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Vegas, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - William Karlsson scored the go-ahead goal with 1:18 remaining, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for a 4-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Friday. “We stuck with it and eventually we got rewarded,” Karlsson said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 37, Cavaliers stay perfect and improve to 14-0 with 144-126 win over Bulls
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 37 points, Darius Garland had 29 and the Cleveland Cavaliers continued one of the best starts in league history, improving to 14-0 with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bountiful headed back to 5A championship game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful Redhawks are headed back to the 5A championship game. Bountiful cruised past Brighton in the 5A semifinals Friday at Rice-Eccles Stadium, 24-8, and will take on Roy for the 5A state title next week.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: SJSU volleyball captain demands removal of transgender athlete
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- Some San Jose State University women's volleyball players are suing their head coach, their university, and the Division-1 Mountain West Conference for allowing a transgender player to be on the team.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Chicago Sports Network launching subscription streaming service
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Sports Network is launching a streaming service Friday amid its negotiations with Xfinity. The subscription service will start at $19.99 for one team or $29.99 for full access to CHSN. A 7-day free trial is being offered.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Bruce-Mahoney basketball games to be played for the first-time ever at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- One of the oldest high school sports rivalries in the country is taking its annual basketball matchup to San Francisco's biggest basketball stage. For the first time, the Bruce-Mahoney basketball game will be played at the Chase Center. The St.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: USC women’s basketball team beats Cal State Northridge by 85 points
item.description: The USC Trojans women’s basketball team was not messing around Tuesday night, shattering the team record for most points scored in a single game. Led by standout JuJu Watkins (21 points, nine assists, six steals), the Trojans beat the Matadors of Cal State Northridge by a score of 124-39.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
